description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden fore-end and stock. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The stock is a full, traditional wooden type with a smooth finish and a slight curve for shoulder support. The receiver and trigger assembly are made of metal, with a rounded trigger guard enclosing the trigger. The overall finish combines polished wood and matte black metal, giving it a utilitarian yet refined appearance. The shotgun is of medium length, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long black barrel, ribbed wooden fore-end, and a full wooden stock. The design is classic, combining polished wood and matte black metal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the width of the stock and fore-end, as well as the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, trigger guard, and the full profile of the wooden components.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the fore-end, barrel, and the curvature of the stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
